content: 围绕“现金流与利润匹配度”：①计算2025年第三季度各公司的经营性现金流净额/净利润比值；②找出比值在0.8-1.2之间的公司；③统计这些公司的数量；④对比这些公司与比值偏离区间公司的资产质量。

tools_used.result:
财报数据库包含以下表：

## _share_capital_cache
字段数: 3
  - stock_code (TEXT)
  - report_period (TEXT)
  - share_capital (REAL)

## balance_sheet
字段数: 21
  - serial_number (INTEGER)
  - stock_code (TEXT)
  - stock_abbr (TEXT)
  - asset_cash_and_cash_equivalents (REAL)
  - asset_accounts_receivable (REAL)
  - asset_inventory (REAL)
  - asset_trading_financial_assets (REAL)
  - asset_construction_in_progress (REAL)
  - asset_total_assets (REAL)
  - asset_total_assets_yoy_growth (REAL)
  - liability_accounts_payable (REAL)
  - liability_advance_from_customers (REAL)
  - liability_total_liabilities (REAL)
  - liability_total_liabilities_yoy_growth (REAL)
  - liability_contract_liabilities (REAL)
  ...及其他 6 个字段

## cash_flow_sheet
字段数: 18
  - serial_number (INTEGER)
  - stock_code (TEXT)
  - stock_abbr (TEXT)
  - net_cash_flow (REAL)
  - net_cash_flow_yoy_growth (REAL)
  - operating_cf_net_amount (REAL)
  - operating_cf_ratio_of_net_cf (REAL)
  - operating_cf_cash_from_sales (REAL)
  - investing_cf_net_amount (REAL)
  - investing_cf_ratio_of_net_cf (REAL)
  - investing_cf_cash_for_investments (REAL)
  - investing_cf_cash_from_investment_recovery (REAL)
  - financing_cf_cash_from_borrowing (REAL)
  - financing_cf_cash_for_debt_repayment (REAL)
  - financing_cf_net_amount (REAL)
  ...及其他 3 个字段

## core_performance_indicators_sheet
字段数: 20
  - serial_number (INTEGER)
  - stock_code (TEXT)
  - stock_abbr (TEXT)
  - eps (REAL)
  - total_operating_revenue (REAL)
  - operating_revenue_yoy_growth (REAL)
  - operating_revenue_qoq_growth (REAL)
  - net_profit_10k_yuan (REAL)
  - net_profit_yoy_growth (REAL)
  - net_profit_qoq_growth (REAL)
  - net_asset_per_share (REAL)
  - roe (REAL)
  - operating_cf_per_share (REAL)
  - net_profit_excl_non_recurring (REAL)
  - net_profit_excl_non_recurring_yoy (REAL)
  ...及其他 5 个字段

## income_sheet
字段数: 21
  - serial_number (INTEGER)
  - stock_code (TEXT)
  - stock_abbr (TEXT)
  - net_profit (REAL)
  - net_profit_yoy_growth (REAL)
  - other_income (REAL)
  - total_operating_revenue (REAL)
  - operating_revenue_yoy_growth (REAL)
  - operating_expense_cost_of_sales (REAL)
  - operating_expense_selling_expenses (REAL)
  - operating_expense_administrative_expenses (REAL)
  - operating_expense_financial_expenses (REAL)
  - operating_expense_rnd_expenses (REAL)
  - operating_expense_taxes_and_surcharges (REAL)
  - total_operating_expenses (REAL)
  ...及其他 6 个字段

tools_used.args:
{"sql": "
-- 查询2025年Q3的现金流和利润数据
SELECT 
    cf.stock_code,
    cf.stock_abbr,
    cf.operating_cf_net_amount,
    inc.net_profit,
    ROUND(CAST(cf.operating_cf_net_amount AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(inc.net_profit, 0), 4) as cf_profit_ratio,
    cf.report_period,
    inc.report_period as income_period
FROM cash_flow_sheet cf
LEFT JOIN income_sheet inc 
    ON cf.stock_code = inc.stock_code 
    AND cf.report_period = inc.report_period
WHERE cf.report_period = '2025-09-30'
    AND cf.operating_cf_net_amount IS NOT NULL
    AND inc.net_profit IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY cf_profit_ratio DESC
LIMIT 20
"}
tools_used.result: Error: 只允许 SELECT 查询

tools_used.args:
{"sql": "
SELECT DISTINCT report_period 
FROM cash_flow_sheet 
ORDER BY report_period DESC 
LIMIT 10
"}

{"sql": "
SELECT 
    cf.stock_code,
    cf.stock_abbr,
    cf.operating_cf_net_amount,
    inc.net_profit,
    ROUND(CAST(cf.operating_cf_net_amount AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(inc.net_profit, 0), 4) as cf_profit_ratio
FROM cash_flow_sheet cf
LEFT JOIN income_sheet inc 
    ON cf.stock_code = inc.stock_code 
    AND cf.report_period = inc.report_period
WHERE cf.report_period = '2025Q3'
    AND cf.operating_cf_net_amount IS NOT NULL
    AND inc.net_profit IS NOT NULL
    AND inc.net_profit != 0
ORDER BY cf_profit_ratio ASC
"}

tools_used.args:
{"sql": "
SELECT 
    cf.stock_code,
    cf.stock_abbr,
    cf.operating_cf_net_amount,
    inc.net_profit,
    ROUND(CAST(cf.operating_cf_net_amount AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(inc.net_profit, 0), 4) as cf_profit_ratio
FROM cash_flow_sheet cf
LEFT JOIN income_sheet inc 
    ON cf.stock_code = inc.stock_code 
    AND cf.report_period = inc.report_period
WHERE cf.report_period = '2025Q3'
    AND cf.operating_cf_net_amount IS NOT NULL
    AND inc.net_profit IS NOT NULL
    AND inc.net_profit != 0
    AND CAST(cf.operating_cf_net_amount AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(inc.net_profit, 0) >= 0.8
    AND CAST(cf.operating_cf_net_amount AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(inc.net_profit, 0) <= 1.2
ORDER BY cf_profit_ratio ASC
"}

tools_used.args:
{"sql": "
-- 比值在0.8-1.2之间的公司的资产质量
SELECT 
    'in_range' as group_type,
    COUNT(DISTINCT cf.stock_code) as company_count,
    ROUND(AVG(CAST(bs.asset_cash_and_cash_equivalents AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(bs.asset_total_assets, 0)), 4) as avg_cash_ratio,
    ROUND(AVG(CAST(bs.asset_accounts_receivable AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(bs.asset_total_assets, 0)), 4) as avg_receivable_ratio,
    ROUND(AVG(CAST(bs.asset_inventory AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(bs.asset_total_assets, 0)), 4) as avg_inventory_ratio,
    ROUND(AVG(CAST(bs.liability_total_liabilities AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(bs.asset_total_assets, 0)), 4) as avg_debt_ratio
FROM cash_flow_sheet cf
LEFT JOIN income_sheet inc 
    ON cf.stock_code = inc.stock_code 
    AND cf.report_period = inc.report_period
LEFT JOIN balance_sheet bs
    ON cf.stock_code = bs.stock_code
    AND cf.report_period = bs.report_period
WHERE cf.report_period = '2025Q3'
    AND cf.operating_cf_net_amount IS NOT NULL
    AND inc.net_profit IS NOT NULL
    AND inc.net_profit != 0
    AND CAST(cf.operating_cf_net_amount AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(inc.net_profit, 0) >= 0.8
    AND CAST(cf.operating_cf_net_amount AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(inc.net_profit, 0) <= 1.2
"}

{"sql": "
SELECT 
    'out_of_range' as group_type,
    COUNT(DISTINCT cf.stock_code) as company_count,
    ROUND(AVG(CAST(bs.asset_cash_and_cash_equivalents AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(bs.asset_total_assets, 0)), 4) as avg_cash_ratio,
    ROUND(AVG(CAST(bs.asset_accounts_receivable AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(bs.asset_total_assets, 0)), 4) as avg_receivable_ratio,
    ROUND(AVG(CAST(bs.asset_inventory AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(bs.asset_total_assets, 0)), 4) as avg_inventory_ratio,
    ROUND(AVG(CAST(bs.liability_total_liabilities AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(bs.asset_total_assets, 0)), 4) as avg_debt_ratio
FROM cash_flow_sheet cf
LEFT JOIN income_sheet inc 
    ON cf.stock_code = inc.stock_code 
    AND cf.report_period = inc.report_period
LEFT JOIN balance_sheet bs
    ON cf.stock_code = bs.stock_code
    AND cf.report_period = bs.report_period
WHERE cf.report_period = '2025Q3'
    AND cf.operating_cf_net_amount IS NOT NULL
    AND inc.net_profit IS NOT NULL
    AND inc.net_profit != 0
    AND (CAST(cf.operating_cf_net_amount AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(inc.net_profit, 0) < 0.8
         OR CAST(cf.operating_cf_net_amount AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(inc.net_profit, 0) > 1.2)
"}
